footer_description: A community-driven platform for challenge run speedrunners and enthusiasts.
footer_copyright_notice: Game content and images are property of their respective owners.
footer_copyright: © {year} Challenge Run Community. All rights reserved.
signin_description: Sign in to submit runs, manage your profile, and track your achievements.
signin_first_time: First time here? Just click one of the buttons below to sign up via Discord or Twitch.
signin_generic_error: Failed to start sign in. Please try again.
signin_agree: By signing in, you agree to our {terms_link} and {privacy_link}.
debug_submissions_disabled: Submissions are disabled in debug mode
sign_in_required_submit: You need to be signed in to submit a run.
glossary_description: Definitions for gameplay interactions and challenge run terminology used across CRC. These are our community standards — individual games may define terms differently on their rules pages.
submit_run_description: Fill in your run details below. All options are specific to {game_name}.
submit_run_category_sub: Select the run tier and category.
submit_run_platform_required: This game requires a platform selection.
submit_run_platform_optional: What platform did you play on? Optional but helpful for verification.
submit_run_challenges_sub: Select all challenges completed in this run.
submit_run_challenge_required: This challenge is required for the selected category.
submit_run_restrictions_sub: Select any optional restrictions applied to this run.
submit_run_restrictions_click_group: Click a group to see options.
submit_run_restriction_required: This restriction is required for the selected category.
submit_run_timing_both: Enter your RTA (real-time) and {label} times. Both are optional but help with verification.
submit_run_timing_single: Enter your run time. Format: HH:MM:SS or MM:SS. Optional but recommended.
submit_run_date_sub: When was this run completed? Optional — will use submission date if left blank.
submit_run_video_error: Must be a YouTube, Twitch, or supported video URL
submit_run_notes_sub: Optional notes about your run (strategy, memorable moments, attempts count, etc.). Max 500 characters.
submit_run_notes_placeholder: e.g. 'First clear after 47 attempts! Almost died to the final boss.'
submit_run_locked_hint: Locked by category — this {label} is required for this challenge.
submit_game_page_title: Request a Game | Challenge Run Community
submit_game_description: Suggest a new game for the Challenge Run Community. Fill in as much as you can — our team will review and refine.
submit_game_required_hint: Fields marked {req} are required. Everything else is optional but helps us set up the game faster.
submit_game_draft_banner: You have a saved draft for this form.
submit_game_draft_hint: You can save a draft of this submission at the bottom of the screen if you want to return to it later.
submit_game_game_name_hint: Please use the full game name.
submit_game_checking: Checking if this game already exists…
submit_game_exists_pending: {name} has already been submitted and is awaiting review
submit_game_add_suggestions_desc: You can add your suggestions below to help shape the game page.
submit_game_first_submit: This game hasn't been submitted yet — you're the first!
submit_game_cover_upload: Click to upload a cover image
submit_game_cover_hint: Recommended: 460×215px (Steam capsule). Accepts JPEG, PNG, WebP — max 5MB.
submit_game_cover_url_fallback: Or paste an external image URL
submit_game_other_platforms_hint: Don't see your platform? Add up to 2 here. These will be reviewed by our team.
submit_game_other_genres_hint: Don't see a genre that fits? Add up to 3 custom genres (counts toward the 5 max). These will be reviewed by our team.
submit_game_max_genres: Maximum of 5 genres reached ({selected} selected + {custom} custom).
submit_game_full_runs_desc: Full runs typically involve completing the game through to the credits.
submit_game_mini_challenges_desc: Smaller challenges like individual boss fights, individual levels, or small gauntlets. Groups can have child categories.
submit_game_standard_challenges_desc: Select challenge types that apply. You can add exceptions for each. Descriptions support Markdown.
submit_game_custom_challenge_toggle: My challenge is not listed here
submit_game_custom_challenge_hint: Suggest a challenge type that would be applicable to a majority of games. Our team will review it.
submit_game_characters_toggle: This game requires you pick a character, weapon, or class before starting the game.
submit_game_characters_min_hint: At least 2 options are required when characters are enabled.
submit_game_column_label_hint: What do you call it? "Character", "Weapon", "Weapon / Aspect", "Class", "Loadout", etc.
submit_game_restrictions_desc: Optional restrictions. A restriction can have children (e.g. "One God Only" → "Zeus Only"). Descriptions support Markdown.
submit_game_glitch_presets_desc: Select glitch policies that apply to this game.
submit_game_nmg_hint: Help our team understand what NMG means for this specific game.
submit_game_custom_glitches_desc: Custom glitch policies unique to this game. Descriptions support Markdown.
submit_game_rules_hint: These should be rules that apply to any and all challenges.
submit_game_rules_review: These will be reviewed and refined by our team.
submit_game_involvement_question: How would you like to be involved?
submit_game_supporter_desc: Your input will help our team build the best game page. All contributions are attributed and preserved — nobody can overwrite your suggestions.
submit_game_val_category: Please add at least 1 run category — click to go there
submit_game_val_challenge: Please select at least 1 challenge type — click to go there
submit_game_val_characters: Characters enabled — at least 2 options required — click to go there
submit_game_fl_hint: Add characters in the Characters tab or restrictions in the Restrictions tab to select fixed loadout options here.
error_404_message: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or may have been moved.
admin_access_denied_role: The {role} role does not have access to this page.
admin_access_denied_hint: Use the Exit Debug button in the debug bar above to return to your real role, or switch to a different role from the debug bar's Navigate menu.
admin_denied_message: You need verifier, moderator, admin, or super admin privileges to access the dashboard.
admin_nav_games_desc: Review pending games and manage approved submissions.
admin_nav_profiles_desc: Review pending profiles and manage approved submissions.
admin_nav_game_editor_desc: Edit game configs — categories, restrictions, rules, characters.
admin_nav_users_desc: Manage users and assign staff roles.
admin_nav_game_updates_desc: Review pending updates and manage approved corrections.
admin_nav_runs_desc: Review pending runs and manage approved runs.
admin_nav_reports_desc: Review user-submitted reports on runners, runs, and games.
admin_verifier_required: You need verifier, moderator, or admin privileges to review runs.
submissions_description: Track and manage your pending submissions.
submissions_no_rejected: No rejected submissions in the last 30 days.
submissions_no_history: No approved submissions in the last 30 days.
submissions_locked_message: A reviewer is currently looking at this submission. Editing and withdrawing are disabled.
submissions_rejected_message: Sorry, but your {type} was rejected. Please see notes for more information.
submissions_withdraw_confirm: Are you sure you want to withdraw this submission? This cannot be undone.
